betOfDay.analysis: Line moved from -12.5 all the way to -14.5 — sharp money has been hammering the Knicks all day. Warriors are 8-20 on the road, one of the worst away records in the league. Knicks are 25-6 at home. Golden State's defense ranks 28th away from home. Every major book locked at -14.5. No movement = consensus. Back the Knicks.

picks.game: Golden State Warriors @ New York Knicks
picks.reasoning: Line locked at -14.5 across FD, DK, BetOnline, BetRivers, Bovada, BetUS, MyBookie — 8 books consensus. Knicks 25-6 at home. Warriors 8-20 on road. No movement = sharps agree.
Kings at home vs worst team in West. Line at -3.5 across DK, BetMGM, LowVig, BetOnline. Kings solid at home, Jazz 10-21 on road with one of worst defensive ratings in NBA.
Oilers elite home team with McDavid leading the way. Nashville Predators are one of the weakest teams in the West. Line consistent at -178 to -200 across all books. Back the Oilers at home.
